pi_items.source: Matched the exact expected string provided in the prompt instructions.
Matched the exact expected string from the prompt instructions, and independently verified via HTTP request that it is an active, valid public RSS feed for BBC News Technology.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world data by subscribing to the live public 'BBC Technology News' RSS feed. The feed URL 'https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/technology/rss.xml' was explicitly verified via HTTP request to be active and serving current BBC news articles.
